scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c bgBlue,bgGreen "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n backend,frontend,electron -c bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "electron ."
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
